Team Great Britain's Anna Henderson has won a silver medal in cycling's Time Trial at the Paris 2024 Olympics.

She finished behind Australia's Grace Brown who took the gold. Henderson's preparation for the Olympics was far from ideal. She broke her collarbone not once but twice this season.

CGTNâs Dan Williams sat down with her following her medal win.

For more, check out our exclusive content onCGTN Nowand subscribe to our weekly newsletter,The China Report.
